productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Solid Black Jacket
description: Composition Black jacket made of 98% cotton and 2% spandex fabric with short pile, has full sleeves with decorative buttons at the cuffs, peaked lapel, buttoned front with tortoise shell buttons, patch pocket on the left chest and two patch pockets on the waist Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash with cold water Wash dark colours separately Do not bleach or wring Dry in shade Warm iron This jacket from united colors of benetton for women is the perfect piece for a formal winter look. The short pile on the fabric gives a velvety feel making this a luxurious, warm choice. Pair it with form fitting jeans, a monochrome shirt and closed toe pumps. Wear a muted scarf to complete your look. Model statistics The product is a a size M on a model of height 5'8” and chest 33”
